Class GameLot

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.cascadia.structure.GameLot
public class GameLot extends Object
Represents the collection of available tile-animal pairs (lots) in the Cascadia game.

The GameLot class manages the available pairs of tiles and animals that players can select during their turn. It supports operations to initialize, replace, and check the lots.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameLot

      public GameLot()
      Constructs an empty GameLot.

  • Method Details

    • initAvailablePair

      public void initAvailablePair(Tiles tiles, FauneBag animals)
      Initializes the available pairs with randomly selected tiles and animals.
      Parameters:
      tiles - the Tiles source for tile selection
      animals - the FauneBag source for animal selection
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if tiles or animals is null

    • replaceSelectedLot

      public void replaceSelectedLot(TileAnimalPair selectedPair, Tiles tiles, FauneBag animals)
      Replaces a selected tile-animal pair with a new randomly selected pair.
      Parameters:
      selectedPair - the TileAnimalPair to replace
      tiles - the Tiles source for tile selection
      animals - the FauneBag source for animal selection
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if selectedPair, tiles, or animals is null

    • replaceSelectedTile

      public void replaceSelectedTile(int indexTile, Tiles tiles)

    • replaceSelectedAnimal

      public void replaceSelectedAnimal(int indexAnimal, FauneBag animals)

    • replaceLotSolo

      public void replaceLotSolo(TileAnimalPair selectedPair, Tiles tiles, FauneBag animals)

    • get

      public TileAnimalPair get(int i)
      Retrieves a tile-animal pair at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      i - the index of the desired TileAnimalPair
      Returns:
      the TileAnimalPair at the specified index
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the index is out of bounds

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of available tile-animal pairs.
      Returns:
      the size of the available pairs list

    • replaceAnimalInPair

      public void replaceAnimalInPair(Animal animal, FauneBag animals)
      Replaces all occurrences of a specific animal in the pairs with new animals.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal to replace
      animals - the FauneBag source for new animals
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animal or animals is null

    • checkNumberFaune

      public void checkNumberFaune(FauneBag animals)
      Checks for animals that occur too frequently in the available pairs and replaces them if needed.
      Parameters:
      animals - the FauneBag source for new animals
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animals is null

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the available tile-animal pairs.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string describing the available pairs
